title: After the Debut: Our First Goal!

text_block_list.name: Matikanetannhauser
text_block_list.text: Huff, puff, huff...

text_block_list.name: Monologue
text_block_list.text: Wooooo!

text_block_list.name: Matikanetannhauser
text_block_list.text:
(The cheers aren't as loud as the ones I heard
during that race I saw on TV back home, but
there's still a ton of people here for my debut
race.)

text_block_list.name: Matikanetannhauser
text_block_list.text:
(Everyone who ran was so talented... They really
gave it their all. Some of them are even crying!)

text_block_list.name: Matikanetannhauser
text_block_list.text: (The Twinkle Series is... It's just so...)

text_block_list.name: Matikanetannhauser
text_block_list.text: Fun!

text_block_list.name: Spectator A
text_block_list.text:
That's Matikanetannhauser, right? She seems
kinda different from the others somehow!

text_block_list.name: Spectator B
text_block_list.text:
Mihono Bourbon made her debut just the other
day, and she was also really good. I think she's
aiming for the Triple Crown or something!

text_block_list.name: Spectator C
text_block_list.text:
Is that right? I don't know if Matikanetannhauser
is going on the Triple Crown tour, but I sure hope
so!

text_block_list.name: Spectator B
text_block_list.text: Boy, I can't wait for their classic year!

text_block_list.name: Monologue
text_block_list.text:
A faint sense of expectation is growing among the
spectators, who can sense Matikanetannhauser's
potential.

text_block_list.name: Matikanetannhauser
text_block_list.text: Debut complete!

text_block_list.name: Matikanetannhauser
text_block_list.text:
This might seem a bit soon, but there's something
I'd like to talk about.

text_block_list.name: Matikanetannhauser
text_block_list.text:
Well... I can't stop wondering why the director
had such high expectations for me even before
my debut.

text_block_list.name: Matikanetannhauser
text_block_list.text:
Why an ordinary Umamusume like me? I just can't
figure it out...

text_block_list.name: Matikanetannhauser
text_block_list.text:
But for her to come out and say it again like that
makes me think there must be some reason
behind it!

text_block_list.name: Matikanetannhauser
text_block_list.text:
That's why I want to start off by taking on every
challenge I can during my classic year!

text_block_list.name: Matikanetannhauser
text_block_list.text:
And on that note, the first thing on the menu is
winning the Classic Triple Crown!

text_block_list.name: Matikanetannhauser
text_block_list.text:
And of course I know it'll be tough! That much is
obvious!

text_block_list.name: Matikanetannhauser
text_block_list.text:
The fastest racer wins the Satsuki Sho, the
luckiest wins the Japanese Derby, and the
strongest wins the Kikuka Sho!

text_block_list.name: Matikanetannhauser
text_block_list.text:
They're all renowned G1 races you can only
compete in once in your lifetime, which of course
attracts all the most passionate Umamusume!

text_block_list.name: Matikanetannhauser
text_block_list.text: But even still, I want those crowns!

text_block_list.name: Matikanetannhauser
text_block_list.text:
I want to be a super cool, super glamorous Triple
Crown champion!

text_block_list.name: Matikanetannhauser
text_block_list.text:
...Yeah, no doubt about it. Even if it's not gonna
be easy, I know what I want.

text_block_list.name: Matikanetannhauser
text_block_list.text: So! Trainer! What do you think?!

text_block_list.name: Monologue
text_block_list.text:
It looks like she understands how tough it'll be,
and as her trainer it's my duty to support her.

text_block_list.name: Matikanetannhauser
text_block_list.text: Yesss! Thanks, Trainer!

text_block_list.name: Matikanetannhauser
text_block_list.text:
Now that that's settled, let's kick things off with a
training journey!

text_block_list.name: Matikanetannhauser
text_block_list.text:
I sort of mentioned it before, but it'd be
impossible for me to win the Triple Crown right
now.

text_block_list.name: Matikanetannhauser
text_block_list.text:
So I need to blast myself up to a level where I
can! One bullet train ticket to Triple Crown town!

text_block_list.name: Matikanetannhauser
text_block_list.text:
To be more specific... I want to get good enough
to place in the top five at a G1 race.

text_block_list.name: Monologue
text_block_list.text: Meanwhile...

text_block_list.name: Nice Nature
text_block_list.text: Wheeze, wheeze... Puff!

text_block_list.name: Nice Nature
text_block_list.text: Huff, huff... Phew. Geez, it's bright out here.

text_block_list.name: Nice Nature
text_block_list.text:
...I guess Tannhauser's debut race is probably
over by now.

text_block_list.name: Nice Nature
text_block_list.text: All right! One more lap!

text_block_list.name: Twin Turbo
text_block_list.text: Ooh, Nature's firing on all cylinders!

text_block_list.name: Ikuno Dictus
text_block_list.text:
Hehe... Well, just the other day she was going on
about how Teio hasn't given up on the Kikuka
Sho despite her fracture.

text_block_list.name: Monologue
text_block_list.text:
Our first objective is to place in a G1 race. I want
our preparation to be on point so that we have a
chance at the Triple Crown next year!
